nak_status_codes.reason: Profile not supported on the requested Channel, Group, or Function Block
Notification Messages – further action is recommended
Terminate Inquiry (replaces PE Notify Message with a status of 144)
Property Exchange Chunks are out of sequence (cannot recover)
Busy, try again time, in multiples of 100 milliseconds (0-12.7 seconds)
